name: delivery-policy
description: Master delivery pipeline policy governing the full deployment lifecycle from build to production verification

policy.principle: Only verified artifacts from upstream layers may be deployed. Deployment is irreversible without explicit rollback.

preDeployment.description: All upstream layers must pass validation before deployment proceeds

deploymentOrder.description: Deployment steps execute sequentially. Failure at any step halts the pipeline.

artifactIntegrity.description: Build artifacts must be standalone Next.js output with a valid git commit

postDeployment.description: Post-deployment verification must confirm the site is live and accessible

rollback.description: Rollback is available but requires explicit approval. Not triggered automatically.
